name: go2-rosbag
description: Record a Unitree Go2's DDS topics to an mcap rosbag from a browser. Discovers every topic the robot exposes (rt/lowstate, rt/sportmodestate, rt/utlidar/*, rt/api/*, ...) with full Unitree message typesupport and records all of them into a bag that opens directly in Foxglove and plays with `ros2 bag play`. CycloneDDS auto-binds to the interface that reaches the Go2.

variables.name: PORT
variables.description: Port for the recorder web UI — open http://<device>:<port> to list topics and start/stop recording

variables.name: GO2_IP
variables.description: Any address on the Go2's internal DDS network — used only to pick the network interface CycloneDDS binds to so discovery finds the robot's topics
